title: Faith in Law Enforcement Career
description: Testimony of a law enforcement officer sharing how God has protected them throughout 8 years of service and a recent dangerous incident where divine intervention prevented harm.
thumbnail_idea: Officer in uniform with shield and Bible overlay
Split screen: police car on one side, angelic protection on other
Close-up of hands holding badge with light rays emanating

title: Medical Miracle Through Faith
description: Powerful testimony of a woman who experienced a high-risk pregnancy where medical professionals predicted loss, but through faith and prayer, God preserved both mother and child against all odds.
thumbnail_idea: Pregnant woman surrounded by medical symbols with divine light
Ultrasound image with angel wings overlay
Mother holding newborn with hospital background fading to light

title: Divine Favor in New Beginnings
description: Testimony of someone who recently arrived in a new country and experienced God's faithfulness through provision, protection, and supernatural favor in employment and daily life.
thumbnail_idea: Suitcase with passport and Bible, rays of light
Person standing before city skyline with divine hand guiding
Split screen: homeland left, new country right with bridge of light

title: Spiritual Favor Brings Worldly Visibility
description: Teaching on how God's favor makes the righteous noticeable and visible in the world, removing the ability to hide when God's favor is upon one's life.
thumbnail_idea: Person in dark room suddenly illuminated by spotlight
Hidden figure becoming visible as light shines on them
Candle in darkness growing to illuminate entire room

title: Favor Decorates Your Life
description: Explanation of favor as God's total package that decorates one's life, making everything work together beautifully when God's favor is present.
thumbnail_idea: Plain Christmas tree becoming fully decorated with ornaments
Gray sketch transforming into vibrant colored painting
Simple outfit being accessorized with jewelry and fine clothes

title: Righteousness Attracts Favor
description: Biblical teaching on how righteousness positions one to receive God's favor, referencing Psalm 5:12 about God blessing the righteous and surrounding them with favor as a shield.
thumbnail_idea: Shield forming around a person with light rays
Scale balancing righteousness on one side, favor on other
Person walking through rain but remaining dry under divine protection

title: Favor Brings Advantage
description: Teaching on how God's favor turns what appears to be disadvantage into advantage, using Joseph's journey from pit to prison to palace as an example.
thumbnail_idea: Downward arrow turning upward with 'Favor' label
Joseph in prison cell with light shining through window
Scale: Pit on left side, Palace on right with favor as fulcrum

title: Kingdom Mindset Over Worldly Thinking
description: Challenge to prioritize God's kingdom over personal ambitions, resources, and timing, emphasizing that readiness for favor comes from kingdom-focused thinking.
thumbnail_idea: Person choosing between crown (kingdom) and money bag (world)
Calendar with God's appointments marked vs personal schedule
Heart divided: half worldly pursuits, half kingdom priorities

title: Worldly Resources for Spiritual Purposes
description: Teaching on stewardship, emphasizing that all resources come from God and should be used for His purposes rather than selfish interests, referencing John 3:27.
thumbnail_idea: Hands releasing money upward toward heaven
Wallet with cross instead of dollar sign
Person using talents/skills to serve others with light rays

title: God First in Life's Priorities
description: Teaching on making God the number one priority in life, with self-reflection questions about prayer life, church involvement, and kingdom-mindedness.
thumbnail_idea: Number one trophy with cross on top
Priority list: God first, then others, then self
Person kneeling with crown removed, placing it at Jesus' feet
